ratings.comment: One of the worst professors I have taken for any course.

She's that average professor you get in most universities. Nothing special about her. She definitely is not student friendly and I did not like this class at all. Expect tough grading and weird assignments that ask for technical depth that freshmen will find hard to achieve. Hopefully, I won't ever have to take her again.
Is extremely monotone, rude, and doesn't seem very knowledgeable of what she teaches.
